feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Partial and Full Pallet Picking from same storage type
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a below Scenario:

A Storage type with multiple Aisles. Out of 5, 4 has partial picking whereas 1 aisle need to have full pallet picking due to space constraints.

is there any way we can always perform the full pallet picking from bins of 1 Asile whereas partial picking from other aisles.

In case of full pallet picking, it will be taken the repacking area to pack in to another HU.

Here Qty. Classification won't help because it is not that, for certain material and based on Qty we can decide the packing behavior.

 

We thought of creating separate storage type for full pallet picking aisle.

Is there any other way we can achieve this.

Thanks and regards,

Atul

entry.title: Set up and apply for strict FIFO method
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I need to set up strict FIFO method for all storage type in EWM. 

But I failed to find the configuration about " activate storage typ determination/ German: Lagertypfindung aktivieren" in the app "configure your solution".

The target ist to put the removal strategie / german: Auslagerungsstrategie "***" in the column of "storage typ"  unter " activate storage type "to set up the strict FIFO for all relevant storage type in EWM.

Could you pls kindly provide some tipps oder test script / ticket notes for further the processing?

thank your very much in advance

Xiawei 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Bonded warehouse implementation in existing EWM warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,


We are planning to implement bonded warehouse solution in EWM for a warehouse.
Kindly help to provide any configuration document and integration settings required between EWM, GTS and ECC systems
We are using EWM 9.5 decentral currently.


Requirement details in brief:
1. Currently warehouse 1234 running on EWM
2. Business wants to keep the bonded warehouse stocks coming from manufacturing plant to this plant.
3. they will separate bonded and non bonded stocks separately using stock type or other parameters.
4. during goods receipt and before putaway, customs declaration to be done (integration with GTS)
5. during goods issue also for both domestic and export (after or before PGI) customs declaration to be done.
6. scrapping and other internal warehouse processes warehouse customs update is required.

We have no knowledge on what configuration needs to be activated from EWM side.
Kindly advise with any documents, what configurations, business functions needs to be activated to work with standard systems.
Once we know what are all work with standard plugins, then we want to work on the Gaps for different business requirements.

Many thanks in anticipation.

Thanks,
Hari.

EWM - Interfaces SAP Global Trade Services SAP Community EWM - Master Data EWM - Goods Movement EWM - Basic Functions

entry.title: Cancellation of GR in embedded EWM while Inspection lot summarization is activated.
entry.content:
Hello community, 

Business needs to activate Inspection lot summarization in material master data in Quality tab. 

On EWM side we would have a problem to cancel GR in case inbound delivery has a link to already existing inspection lot. System will show message: HU content was changed - GR cancellation not possible, /SCWM/GM069. 

Solution provided in note https://me.sap.com/notes/3298538/E does not work, solution provided in https://me.sap.com/notes/3052659 is not acceptable by Logistic business. 

Does anyone has better solution/workaround in such a case? 

Thank you in advance.

#EWM/QM_integration

entry.title: WM 9.5 vs. RISE embedded WMS
entry.content:
Hi,

I am searching for an information or a content that compares WMS 9.5 and RISE embedded WMS functionality to build a value proposition for the customer. The customer has got WMS 9.5 and we would like to demonstrate the RISE embedded WMD implementation related value to support the RISE transformation. 

thanks in advance,

Mehmet

Supply Chain Value Advisor APJ

entry.title: Negative stock ODO goods issue not possible
Create a PI doc after confirmation WT
entry.content:
Hi experts,

My customer wants to automatically create an inactive PI document after confirmation, for example, 40 WTs per product. Can I do this using EWM standards?

entry.title: how to set up PMR automatically when Production order is released?
entry.content:
how to set up PMR automatically when Production order is released?

As of right now, I'm manually generating PMR. The expectation is as soon as the Production order is released, the system should automatically create PMR request to EWM. 

Where can I make this settings?

entry.title: EWM 9.4 interface with Automated guided Vehicle
entry.content:
our Current system is SAP EWM 9.4 , 

We are looking to interface Automated Guided Vehicle-> forklift to EWM , can you somebody elicit the prerequisites and needed infrastructure. 

also kindly make us understand via BTP interfacing to AVG and on Prem direct to EWM, if Direct to EWM can we use MFS to link the interface?

 

regards

entry.title: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing from EWM to ERP post Goods receipt
entry.content:
Hello,

We are setting up the Decentralized EWM system (2309) and trying to create our 1st Inbound Delivery in EWM. Inbound Delivery has been created in ERP and distributed to EWM. We have done Goods receipt in EWM and the PPF "Send ERP Delivery messages" is in yellow status and have not executed it. Why it has not executed automatically even though settings are in placed

Also when we try to reprocess it, it is giving time out dump.

Can anyone provide any advice on this?

entry.title: Batch managed tick at plant level in ERP not flowing to EWM via ALE Idoc
entry.content:
Hello,

We have SAP ERP 6 EHP6 version wherein Batch is set at Plant level.

We are linking SAP EWM Decentralised 2309 version to SAP ERP wherein we have also set Batch at Plant level same as ERP.

We are transferring Batch managed products from ERP to EWM via ALE idoc but Batch managed tick at plant level is not flowing from ERP to EWM.

In EWM, we can see Batch managed indicator set on material master in MM03 but Batch managed indicator is not set in Warehouse product in /SCWM/MAT1.

What can be reason for this and how can we set this?

Thanks

entry.title: Broken goods - rounding
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I would like to ask a question regarding the broken goods process / posting outbound delivery from EWM to ERP.

First i would like to start with an example: 

lets say you have an article who has outbound unit of measurement carton / one carton contains 6 pieces

picked quantity should be for example 4 cartons but the picker activates the broken goods process and picks out 2 additional pieces of that article 

the math in this case should be following: 

4x6 =24 +2 =26

26/6 =4,333

4,333*6 is 25,998

that result of 25,998 is also being booked on ERP 

the question is , is there any way to set up the system to round this corectly to have whole units. 

thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP DM - EWM Goods Receipt Failed
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have the following problem:

We have connected our ERP with SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP Extended Warehouse Management. We would now like to post a goods receipt in the order POD after completing the SFC and material consumption. Unfortunately, we get the following error:

We have tried various settings in the “Manage Next Numbers” app, unfortunately without success. It seems to be an inconsistency with the HU/SSCC Settings. We have used the settings from the SAP Guide for Advanced Production Integration and MES-driven Staging. 

Please let me know if you have any ideas.

thank you and best regards

entry.title: Multiple Quality Bins - One for Recieving and one for production
entry.content:
Business wants to have two Quality Bin locations and tied to two different process

1. On GR from supplier to Quality Bin location QUA-1

2. On GR from Production to Wuality Bin Location QUA-2

After either inpsection is completed standard putway is applied to move to WH storage

entry.title: Packaging Specification is not determined after Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do an automatic packing for an inbound delivery. However, no HU is created automatically even though I have provided correct details in the Determination tab in transaction SCWM/PACKSPEC (See below screenshots)

Packaging Specification

Condition Type: 0IBD

Level Set: ZPALLET

HU Creation: Ticked

 

Inbound Delivery

HEADER

GR Office: SCU-9902

 

ITEM

Product: 100006

 

Ship-From: Z000000034

 

Next are my configuration for the Packaging Specification Determination

1. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Maintain Structure of Packaging Specification > Define Level Sets 

 

2. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Access Sequence

Access Seq.: 0IBD

 

3. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Condition Type

Condition Type: 0IBD

Access Seq.: 0IBD

4. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > Master Data > Packaging Specification > Determination of Packaging Specification > Define Determination Procedure

Procedure: 0IBD

Condition Type: 0IBD

5. SPRO > SCM EWM > EWM > GR Process > Inbound Delivery > Define Document Type for Inbound Deliveries Process

Document Type: INB

Doc. Category: PDI

Additionally, I tried to pack in Inbound Delivery > Follow-up Function > Pack --- and then by clicking the "Pack Automatically" icon, my material is packed based on what I have maintained in the packaging specification.

What I am expecting is, HUs will be created automatically once Inbound Delivery is distributed to EWM and not by clicking manually  the "Pack Automatically" Icon

Q: Any idea what do I miss?

 

Thanks,

Vince

entry.title: remove/hide partially delivered & TECOed purchase order from VL10B display list
entry.content:
Hello

 

1- How can i remove or hide a TECOed & partially delivered purchase order from VL10B display list ?

2- How can i change delivery note print order, i.e. want to display bin order

 

Thanks

Nabeel

entry.title: Floor level Picking
entry.content:
What could be donewithout creating new storage type (if possible) to have EWM picking pick from the floor level bins.

Would storage sectioning be the best way to achieve is by create storage section FLOOR and then assigning floor level bins to the storage section. Then in material master have stock removal rule set to storage section FLOOR

Is the way I have it oulined the best way to achieve this?

Putaway would stay the same for inboud task. mixed storage (add to existing or empty)

entry.title: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound Delivery Directly in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I'm trying to create inbound deliveries directly in our decentralized SAP EWM system without a connected SAP ERP. I've already referred to the following threads on the forum, but they haven't provided a solution:

  • How to create Inbound Delivery through FM/BAPI just in the EWM system?
  • Creation of Inbound delivery in EWM - SAP Community

My specific requirement is to create inbound deliveries programmatically or via a batch job based on external data stored in our custom tables.

I'm wondering if there are any standard ABAP classes, Function Modules (FM), or BAPIs available in SAP EWM that can be used to achieve this.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How can i adjust the HU_LABEL in the public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

how can i adjust the HU_LABEL in the public cloud? And use/print a version e.g. without sled and/or Material Info. Just the Barcode.

 

br, Patrick

entry.title: SAP EWM Error message /SCWM/UI_RF021
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

I am getting the following message everytime I try to confirm a warehouse task on RFUI but only with this SKU

Picking and Putaway get the same message
I suspect that it could be something related to the conversion Unit. Maybe someone modified MM02 or MAT1 of this material and messed something up. All my conversion units are in Spanish, not english.
